title: Redis Key-Value Structure
description: JSON structure for a Redis key and its value, supporting all core data types.

fields.name: value
fields.description: The stored value. Shape depends on type.

fields.name: ttl
fields.description: Time-to-live in seconds. -1 means no expiry.

fields.name: encoding
fields.description: Internal Redis encoding (embstr, raw, ziplist, etc.).
